title: sida malangensis
intro: Sida malangensis is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sida malangensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Sida malangensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to the skin to treat skin conditions and wounds.
